_provenance: D3 absorb (, absorbed from the sandcastle-orchestration sandbox surface): a mixed rubric proving runnable ⊥ rubric. `tests` is a runnable criterion (its scorecard value is a command EXIT CODE reported by VERIFY; pass = exit 0, zero-LLM). `readability` is a normal LLM-scored rubric criterion. Both coexist in one decide().

criteria.description: the artifact's test suite passes — VERIFY runs the command and reports its exit code (0 = pass)
